nasb.text: Then some came and reported to Jehoshaphat, saying, “A great multitude is coming against you from beyond the sea, out of Aram and behold, they are in Hazazon-tamar (that is Engedi).”

esv.text: Some men came and told Jehoshaphat, “A great multitude is coming against you from Edom, from beyond the sea; and, behold, they are in Hazazon-tamar” (that is, Engedi).

cnv.text: 有人來向約沙法報告說：“從海的對岸，就是從以東，有大軍前來攻擊你；現在他們在哈洗遜．他瑪。”哈洗遜．他瑪就是隱．基底。

ccb.text: 有人禀告约沙法说：“有一支大军从死海对岸的以东杀来，已经攻到哈洗逊·他玛。”哈洗逊·他玛就是隐·基底。
